}<|file_sep|><|fim_prefix|>/README.md
# Real Estate Data Normalization Engine

This project is a deterministic data-normalization engine designed to transform raw real-estate listing rows into normalized JSON objects. The engine follows strict rules and guidelines to ensure precision and completeness in the output.

## Features

- Transforms raw real-estate listing rows into normalized JSON objects.
- Extracts and normalizes various fields such as title, description, price, bedrooms count, bathrooms count, parking spaces count, property type, listing status, address, and more.
- Handles numeric normalization, address extraction, and feature identification.
- Adheres to strict rules and guidelines to ensure precision and completeness in the output.

## Usage

To use the Real Estate Data Normalization Engine, follow these steps:

1. Clone the repository:
   ```
   git clone https://github.com/your-username/real-estate-normalization-engine.git
   ```

2. Install the required dependencies:
   ```
   npm install
   ```

3. Run the normalization engine:
   ```
   node index.js
   ```

4. The engine will process the raw real-estate listing rows and generate normalized JSON objects.

## Input Format

The input data should be provided in the following format:

```json
{
  "title": "string | null",
  "description": "string | null",
  "price": "number | null",
  "bedrooms_count": "integer | null",
  "bathrooms_count": "integer | null",
  "parking_spaces_count": "integer | null",
  "property_type": "house | apartment | land | country_house | gated_house | gated_land | commercial | warehouse | farm | other | null",
  "listing_status": "for_sale | for_rent | for_sale_and_rent | sold | rented | null",
  "raw_address": "string | null",
  "street": "string | null",
  "street_number": "string | null",
  "complement": "string | null",
  "neighborhood": "string | null",
  "city": "string | null",
  "state": "string(2) | null",
  "country": "BR",
  "normalized_features": "array of strings",
  "total_area_m2": "number | null",
  "private_area_m2": "number | null",
  "suites_count": "integer | null",
  "floors_count": "integer | null",
  "year_built": "integer | null",
  "condo_fee": "number | null",
  "property_tax": "number | null"
}
```

## Output Format

The normalized JSON objects will be generated in the following format:

```json
{
  "title": "string | null",
  "description": "string | null",
  "price": "number | null",
  "bedrooms_count": "integer | null",
  "bathrooms_count": "integer | null",
  "parking_spaces_count": "integer | null",
  "property_type": "house | apartment | land | country_house | gated_house | gated_land | commercial | warehouse | farm | other | null",
  "listing_status": "for_sale | for_rent | for_sale_and_rent | sold | rented | null",
  "raw_address": "string | null",
  "street": "string | null",
  "street_number": "string | null",
  "complement": "string | null",
  "neighborhood": "string | null",
  "city": "string | null",
  "state": "string(2) | null",
  "country": "BR",
  "normalized_features": "array of strings",
  "total_area_m2": "number | null",
  "private_area_m2": "number | null",
  "suites_count": "integer | null",
  "floors_count": "integer | null",
  "year_built": "integer | null",
  "condo_fee": "number | null",
  "property_tax": "number | null"
}
```

## Rules and Guidelines

- Output JSON only.
- No explanations.
- No markdown.
- No comments.
- No trailing commas.
- Do not change field names.
- Do not add fields.
- Do not remove fields.
- Do not rename fields.
- Do not fabricate values.
- Do not improve data unless explicitly instructed.
- Never infer values from context unless rules below allow it.

If a value is missing or uncertain в†’ use null.

## Numeric Normalization

Brazilian numeric format:

- "." = thousand separator
- "," = decimal separator

Convert to:

- "." = decimal separator only

Examples:
- "1.250.000" в†’ 1250000.00
- "267,50" в†’ 267.50

Remove:
- currency symbols
- text
- whitespace

## Area Rules

- terreno / lote в†’ total_area_m2
- ГЎrea construГ­da / privativa в†’ private_area_m2
- if area type is unclear в†’ do not extract

## Property Type Mapping

Available types: house | apartment | land | country_house | gated_house | gated_land | commercial | warehouse | farm | other

Extract if clearly stated based on the mapping below (it may appear on the title, description or maybe in the url slug):

- casa в†’ house
- apartamento / apto в†’ apartment
- terreno / lote в†’ land
- sala comercial / loja в†’ commercial
- casa em condominio в†’ gated_house
- chacara в†’ country_house
- sitio / fazenda в†’ farm
- galpao в†’ warehouse
- terreno em condominio в†’ gated_land

Otherwise в†’ other

## Listing Status

Available statuses: for_sale | for_rent | for_sale_and_rent | sold | rented

If not explicit в†’ null

## Address Rules

Extract address fields ONLY if explicitly present, it may appear on the title or description of the raw listings. You can infer only the country and state(even if not present, with the city information you can infer it).

If uncertain в†’ keep data only in raw_address.

## Features

raw_features:
- exact text fragments extracted from input

normalized_features:
- normalized English tags only if feature is explicit.
- MUST be a subset of the following allowed features: pool, heated_pool, childrens_pool, gym, playground, kids_playroom, barbecue_area, gourmet_area, party_room, sauna, game_room, sports_court, tennis_court, garden, vegetable_garden, orchard, park, rooftop, deck, terrace, balcony, backyard, furnished, built_in_cabinets, fitted_kitchen, air_conditioning, solar_heating, fireplace, whirlpool, hot_tub, high_ceiling, wine_cellar, master_suite, closet, office, tv_room, dining_room, half_bath, social_bathroom, kitchen, pantry, laundry_room, staff_quarters, maid_bathroom, gated, doorman, security_24h, guard_house, intercom, monitoring_company, electric_fence, electronic_gate, elevator, service_elevator, solar_panels, cistern, piped_water, sewage_system, electricity, paved_street, bicycle_storage, storage_unit, service_entrance, caretaker, pet_friendly, ocean_view, mountain_view, city_view, garden_view, morning_sun, afternoon_sun, covered_parking, street_parking, private_garage, parking_space

If not explicit в†’ do not include.

## Input вЂ” Raw Unnormalized Row

**LISTING DATA:**

**Title:** Apartamento Г  venda com 3 quartos no EdifГ­cio Zenith, Jardim Andrade em Londrina.
**Description:** Apartamento EdifГ­cio para venda no Andrade em Londrina. R$ 1.400.00
